{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>'''Sheet Music Collector:'''Sergeant's Sheet Music: missing soul name'''Searching for the Deity:''' Taoist Yu Ji Requirements}}

==Key Clue Records==
Complete these Key Clues in [[Cathay]] for various rewards and to fully progress through the Realm.<BR>
Advisor Zhuge's Key Clue "Uphold the Empire" is Very Rare! It may take many, many runs to get it!

==Longzhong Plan==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}

See {{RewardIcon|Intel}}[[Cathay INTEL]] for more
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Master all Wei INTEL
|Obtain all 41 [[Cathay INTEL#Wei|Wei INTEL]] tiles
|-
|Master all Shu INTEL
|Obtain 36 [[Cathay INTEL#Shu|Shu INTEL]] tiles
|-
|Master all Wu INTEL
|Obtain all 37 [[Cathay INTEL#Wu|Wu INTEL]] tiles
|}

==Fight in Central Plains==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +4h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}

See [[Cathay Apostles]] for more
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Approximate Strength
|-
|Dominate Apostle of North Jingzhou
|Defeat [[Cathay Apostles#General Xiahou D.|General Xiahou D..]] within 2 rounds
|1m
|-
|Dominate Apostle of Red Cliff
|Defeat [[Cathay Apostles#Politician Cao|Politician Cao]] within 2 rounds
|1.1m
|-
|Dominate Apostle of Chang'an
|Defeat [[Cathay Apostles#Dong Zhuo|Dong Zhuo]] within 2 rounds
|1.2m
|}

==Cathay Life==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +600}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}

See [[Cathay Cards]] for more
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (white)
|Exchange all 11 white card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (green)
|Exchange all 11 green card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (blue)
|Exchange all 11 blue card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (purple)
|Exchange all 11 purple card items
|-
|Redeem all limited cards (orange)
|Exchange all 8 orange card items
|}

==Call for An Ordered World==
'''Rewards:'''  {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}},  {{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +3}}

See [[Cathay Generals]] for more
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Recruit all Wei Generals
|-
|Recruit all Shu Generals
|-
|Recruit all Wu Generals
|-
|Recruit all Warlord Generals
|}

==Cathay Treasure==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +50}},  {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +10|blue}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!<nowiki>#</nowiki> of items found
!Rewards
|-
|Wuhan Treasure (Youzhou)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}, Suzaku Spirit +1
|-
|Wu Mission Gift (Youzhou)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +3k}}
|-
|Granary (Xuchang)
|2
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +2000}}
|-
|Plum Wine Barrel (Xuchang)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}}
|-
|Dew Temple Bride Price (Yangzhou)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +10|purple}}
|-
|Shanyue Treasure (Yangzhou)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, Genbu Spirit +1
|-
|Advisor Zhuge's Tips (Chengdu)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Green Reagent, +50|green}}
|-
|Hot Pot Voucher (Chengdu)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, Zhang Fei Beef +50
|-
|Lady Fan's Dowry (South Jingzhou)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +3k}}
|-
|Sabre Infantry Luggage (South Jingzhou)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, Seiryuu Spirit
|-
|Yellow Turban Amulet (Ji Zhou)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Great Sage Gift (Ji Zhou)
|2
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +40|blue}}
|-
|Rattan Casket (Nanzhong)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, Genbu Spirit +1
|-
|Barbarian Gift (Nanzhong)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Nymph of Luo Gift (Luoyang)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +400}}, Byakko Spirit +1
|-
|Prince Chen's Offering (Luoyang)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +2h}}
|-
|Jingzhou Marine Supply (North Jingzhou)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +400}}, Seiryuu Spirit +1
|-
|Scholar Sima Gift (North Jingzhou)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, Byakko Spirit +1
|-
|Scarecrow Full of Arrows (Red Cliff)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +400}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +2000}}
|-
|Du Kang Wine Barrel (Red Cliff)
|3
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, Du Kang Wine +50
|-
|Qin Terracotta (Chang'an)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Imperial Lamp|blue}} Fragment +10
|-
|Horse Riding Bag (Chang'an)
|4
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +400}}, Suzaku Spirit +1
|}

==Sky Piercer==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +150}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}

See [[Gear]] for more
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Craft {{RewardIcon|Wu Scimitar}}[[Gear|<span style="color:#40da25;">Scimitar</span>]]
|-
|Craft {{RewardIcon|Ancient Blade}}[[Gear|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Ancient Blade</span>]]
|-
|Craft {{RewardIcon|7-Star Blade}}[[Gear|<span style="color:#ee96d5;">7-Star Blade</span>]]
|-
|Craft {{RewardIcon|Couple Swords}}[[Gear|<span style="color:#ffb066;">Couple Swords</span>]]
|-
|Craft {{RewardIcon|Sky Piercer}}[[Gear|<span style="color:#f66;">Sky Piercer</span>]]
|}

==Kidnap for Power==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +80|blue}}, Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay Strategist Sima Yi]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Emperor Xian's Token (Luoyang)
|4,350 TECH
|{{RewardIcon|Intel}}Cathay INTEL +2000, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Emperor Wu's Token (Xuchang)
|4,450 CIV
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Prime Minister's Token (Luoyang)
|4,680 ART
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Warlord Battle==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +2h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +8k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Brawler Zhang Fei's Token (North Jingzhou)
|5,100 FAME
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +1h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Faithful Guan Yu's Token (Luoyang)
|5,640 FAME
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Politician Liu Bei's Token (Chang'an)
|6,300 FAME
|{{RewardIconWithText|Lottery Ticket, +1}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Uphold the Empire==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +2|orange}}, Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General Advisor Zhuge]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Life in the Farm (North Jingzhou)
|5,100 TECH
|{{RewardIcon|Bronze Bird}}[[Bronze Bird|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Bronze Bird</span>]] Fragment +3, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Life in the Cabinet (Chengdu)
|5,250 TECH
| {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Life in the Barrack (Luoyang)
|5,350 CIV
| {{RewardIcon|Intel}}Cathay INTEL +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Advisor Zhuge (Chang'an)
|Meet with [[Lee Gi-na]]
| {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +200}},  {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +1h}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Tripartite Confrontation==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent, +80|blue}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +5k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Military Map of Wei (Ji Zhou)
|5,200 ART
|{{RewardIcon|Bronze Bird}}[[Bronze Bird|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Bronze Bird</span>]] Fragment +2, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Military Map of Shu (Nanzhong)
|5,600 ART
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +20m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Military Map of Wu (Red Cliff)
|6,500 CIV
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Campaign Against Dong Zhuo==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map, +50}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +4h}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Politician Yuan Shao's Token (Ji Zhou)
|5,500 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|General Hua's Token (South Jingzhou)
|5,000 FAME
|Soul of General Hua, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Politician Sun Ce's Token (Yangzhou)
|4,700 TECH
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +120}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Politician Niu's Token (Chang'an)
|4,900 FAME
|Soul of ?, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==The Game of Cat & Mouse==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +5000}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +5000}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Wutugu's Surrender Letter (Chengdu)
|4,200 TECH
|{{RewardIcon|Intel}}Cathay INTEL +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|King Mulu's Surrender Letter (Nanzhong)
|4,480 CIV
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Meng Huo's Surrender Letter (Nanzhong)
|4,730 CIV
|{{RewardIcon|Bronze Bird}}[[Bronze Bird|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Bronze Bird</span>]] Fragment+2, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Symbol of Power==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Expert Scroll, +20|purple}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, 8k}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Bronze Tripod of Wei (Xuchang)
|4,100 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Bronze Tripod of Shu (Chengdu)
|4,200 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Bronze Tripod of Wu (Yangzhou)
|4,400 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Y.T. Bronze Tripod (Youzhou)
|4,600 FTH
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Army Recruitment Notice==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIcon|Intel}}Cathay Treasure Map +50, {{RewardIconWithLink|Ad Chest, +60}}
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Rewards
|-
|Watch Yellow Turban ad (Youzhou)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|-
|Watch Qingzhou Army ad (Xuchang)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Glue, +20}}
|-
|Watch Ji Zhou Army ad (Ji Zhou)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +2k}}
|-
|Watch Wu Marine ad (Red Cliff)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ad Chest, +10}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +30m}}
|}

==Sheet Music Collector==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +800}}, Partner [[Lee Gi-na]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Ancient Sheet Music (Red Cliff)
|4,800 TECH
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Expert Scroll, +3|purple}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Hun Sheet Music (Youzhou)
|4,900 ART
|{{RewardIconWithText|Travel Speedup, +20m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Sergeant's Sheet Music (Luoyang)
|4,550 FAME
|Soul of ?, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Ancient Sage's Tomb==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense|orange}} +1, {{RewardIconWithLink|Cathay Treasure Map}} +50 
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Display 1 of
!Rewards
|-
|Saint Yao's Bloodline (Ji Zhou)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Maze Diagrams|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Pear Basket|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Wooden Ox|green}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}, +100}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Yellow Emperor's Bloodline (South Jingzhou)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Bronze Bird|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Imperial Lamp|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Musician Figure|blue}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Nuwa's Bloodline (North Jingzhou)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Fuchun Mountains|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Jade Burial Suit|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Marquis Bell|purple}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +150}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Fuxi's Bloodline (Xuchang)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Buddha's Skull Sarira|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Imperial Jade|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Houmuwu Ding|orange}}
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Yellow Turban Rebellion==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +8h}}, Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General Master Zuo Ci]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Taoist Rune (Youzhou)
|4,400 TECH
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +100}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Strange Melon Vine (Red Cliff)
|5,000 TECH
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Novice Scroll, +5|blue}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Y.T. Soldier's Remain (Youzhou)
|4800 ART
|{{RewardIcon|Bronze Bird}}[[Bronze Bird|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Bronze Bird</span>]] Fragment +2, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

==Searching for the Deity==
'''Rewards:''' {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup, +8h}}, Unlock [[Cathay Generals|Cathay General Taoist Yu Ji]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Yellow Turban's Amulet (South Jingzhou)
|4,300 FAME
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +30m}}, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Taoist God's Exorcism Charm (Chang'an)
|5,250 FAME
|{{RewardIcon|Bronze Bird}}[[Bronze Bird|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Bronze Bird</span>]] Fragment +3, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|-
|Taoist Yu Ji (Yangzhou)
|?
|{{RewardIcon|Intel}}Cathay Treasure Map +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size, +100}}
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Cathay]]
